emails.body:
Cisco Security Digest – 1 Oct 2026

1. **CVE‑2026‑3421** – Critical remote code execution in IOS XE 17.9.x. Patch released in 17.9.4; apply within 72 hrs.
2. **CVE‑2026‑3510** – High‑severity denial‑of‑service in Meraki MX firmware 18.2.1. Work‑around: disable IPv6 tunneling until 18.2.3.
3. **Advisory CSA‑2026‑018** – Updated guidance on Secure Boot configuration for Catalyst 9000 series.
4. **Threat Intel** – Observed exploitation of CVE‑2026‑3421 by APT‑29 in the wild; IOC list attached in the portal.
5. **Action Items** – Verify patch compliance on all edge routers by 5 Oct; update inventory with new firmware versions.

---
NEWS‑009 Editorial Team
news-009@newsletters.example

Cisco Security Digest – 2 Oct 2026

1. **CVE‑2026‑3675** – Medium severity information disclosure in Webex Meetings Server 41.5. Fixed in 41.5.2.
2. **CVE‑2026‑3712** – Critical privilege escalation in ASA 9.16(2). Emergency patch 9.16(2)‑1 released; prioritize deployment.
3. **Advisory CSA‑2026‑019** – Revised hardening checklist for DNA Center 2.3.x.
4. **Threat Intel** – New campaign leveraging CVE‑2026‑3712 targeting VPN concentrators; indicators posted to the shared drive.
5. **Reminder** – Quarterly compliance report due 15 Oct; include patch status for all Cisco assets.

---
NEWS‑009 Editorial Team
news-009@newsletters.example
